query: SELECT p.id, p.orderId, o.userId, p.status, p.createdAt FROM payments p JOIN orders o ON p.orderId = o.id WHERE o.userId = 720005 ORDER BY p.id DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xXBrmga3niPAGt.e0ccec4a89ee --database HEFiacXNVZGj8v7VkecB9b --execute SELECT p.id, p.orderId, o.userId, p.status, p.createdAt FROM payments p JOIN orders o ON p.orderId = o.id WHERE o.userId = 720005 ORDER BY p.id DESC;
